fields.summary: Confluence Jira macro not rendering - showing error on all pages using it
fields.description: The Jira Issues macro on our sprint planning pages stopped rendering yesterday. All pages that embed Jira issue lists now show: Failed to load Jira issues. The Jira integration was working fine until a Confluence admin changed some settings. We use this macro across 40 sprint planning pages and it is blocking our planning process.

content.text: The macro error says: App link to Jira is not configured or has expired. Our Confluence admin mentioned they updated the Jira application link recently as part of a URL change.

The Jira application link in Confluence needs to be re-authenticated after the Jira URL change. Go to Confluence Settings > Application Links > find the Jira link > click Edit > re-enter the Jira base URL and re-authenticate with admin credentials. The OAuth token between Confluence and Jira expired when the URL changed.

Re-authenticated the application link. All Jira macros are now rendering correctly across all 40 pages. For future reference: any Jira URL change requires re-authentication of the Confluence-Jira application link.
